tasks.title: Scale PostgreSQL for Production
subtasks: Configure automated daily backups for 'sigma1-postgres' to S3/R2.
Configure WAL archiving for 'sigma1-postgres' to S3/R2.

tasks.title: Scale Redis/Valkey for Production
subtasks: Enable Redis Sentinel for 'sigma1-valkey' with 3 replicas.

tasks.title: Implement Production Ingress and TLS
subtasks: Deploy cert-manager for automated TLS certificate provisioning.
Configure cert-manager to issue Let's Encrypt certificates for all external services.
Deploy and configure an Ingress controller (e.g., NGINX or Envoy) for external traffic.
Configure Ingress resources for all services requiring external access (e.g., Equipment Catalog, RMS REST, Finance, Vetting, Morgan AI web chat).

tasks.title: Harden Network Policies and Configure CDN
subtasks: Configure Cloudflare CDN for static assets served from S3/R2 (e.g., product images).
Implement granular network policies to restrict pod-to-pod traffic to only necessary communication paths.
Review and refine existing basic network policies for production-grade security.

tasks.title: Implement Production-Grade Observability
subtasks: Deploy OpenTelemetry collector with appropriate sampling rates.
Deploy Jaeger with persistent storage for traces.
Configure services (Equipment Catalog, RMS, Finance, Vetting, Morgan AI) to send traces to OpenTelemetry collector.
Define and implement alert rules for key SLO violations (e.g., latency, error rates, availability).
